$comment: Single source of truth for the AI model files that the Windows installer bundles via electron-builder extraResources (build.extraResources: resources/models -> models). scripts/preflight-models.cjs reads this to FAIL the build loudly when a model is missing, so a fresh clone never ships an installer with an AI feature silently absent. To add a future model: append an entry here (file + feature required; sizeBytes/sha256 optional/documentary). Sizes and hashes mirror resources/models/README.md.

models.feature: Enhance -> Upscale (AI super-resolution, Real-ESRGAN external weights)
